runtime.setupWarningIntro: User scripts are off. Chrome 138 or newer needs the per-extension
runtime.searchScriptsCodeTitle: Search by script name, domain, tag, or code:fetch
runtime.searchScriptsCodeAria: Search scripts by name, domain, tag, or code:fetch
runtime.scriptsWorkspaceDescription: Manage, review, and run your userscripts from one trusted workspace.
runtime.selectAllShownScriptsTable: Select all shown scripts in table
runtime.popupRunContextMenuScriptAria: Run a context-menu script on this tab
runtime.popupNoScriptsDefaultHint: Find trusted scripts or create one for this site.
runtime.popupNoScriptsRestrictedHint: Switch to a regular website or local file to search for matching scripts.
runtime.popupNoScriptsHostHint: Search GreasyFork for {hostname} or create a focused script for this site.
runtime.popupDoNotRunOnDomain: Do not run on this domain
runtime.sideNoPageScriptsToggle: No page scripts are available to toggle
runtime.sideGrantAccessBeforeMatching: Grant browser access before matching scripts can run here.
runtime.sideHostAccessUnavailable: Host access is not available for this page
runtime.sideUnableToReachBackground: Unable to reach the background service. Refresh the panel to reconnect.
runtime.sideNoRegularPageTitle: Scripts don’t run on this page.
runtime.sideNoRegularPageDetail: Open a regular website or local file to review matching userscripts.
runtime.sideNoMatchingScriptsTitle: No matching scripts on this page.
runtime.sideNoMatchingScriptsDetail: No scripts in your vault match this page.
runtime.sideNoScriptsInVault: No scripts in your vault yet.
runtime.sideOpenDashboardToCreate: Open Dashboard to create or import a userscript.
runtime.sideBulkUpdateFailed: Failed to update scripts on this page.
runtime.installReviewDescription: Review permissions, scope, and source details before bringing a script into ScriptVault.
runtime.popupFirefoxPermissionUnavailable: Firefox permission request API is unavailable
runtime.popupFirefoxPermissionDenied: Firefox userScripts permission was not granted
runtime.popupHostAccessUnavailable: Host access is not available for this page
runtime.popupCouldNotReachBackground: Could not reach the background service.
runtime.popupCheckScriptRemoteTitle: Check {name} against its remote update URL.
runtime.popupNoRemoteInstallUrlTitle: {name} does not declare a remote install URL.
runtime.popupUnsupportedScopeHost: This site can't be scoped (IP-literal host)
runtime.popupOpenNormalPageFirst: Open a normal web page first
runtime.installAnalysisRunningBackground: Static analysis is running in the background.
runtime.installDependencyNotStarted: Dependency checks have not started yet.
runtime.installProvenanceNotStarted: Dependency provenance checks have not started yet.
runtime.installSignatureCheckingDetail: Checking embedded signature and signer trust.
runtime.installDecisionHintArmed: Press Cancel again to discard this review, or wait a few seconds to keep reviewing.
runtime.installDecisionHintDefault: Press Enter to {action} when the install button is focused. Press Esc to arm cancel.
runtime.installDecisionChecksRunningCopy: ScriptVault is still checking this script. You can keep reviewing permissions, scope, source, and code. The final checks will update here.
runtime.installDecisionDependencyFailedCopy: Some dependency checks failed. Review them before you install.
runtime.installDecisionProvenanceReviewCopy: One or more @require provenance checks failed or did not finish. Review them before you install.
runtime.installDecisionSignatureWarningCopy: A signature check found a warning. Review the signer before you install.
runtime.installDecisionReadyCopy: The scans, dependency checks, provenance, and signer trust all look good.
runtime.installDecisionCleanSoFarCopy: The signature is valid, but this signer is not trusted in ScriptVault yet.
runtime.installDecisionManualReviewCopy: This script does not declare an embedded signature, so source and code review matter more here.
runtime.installDecisionReadyForDecisionCopy: ScriptVault finished its checks. Review the install options and decide how you want this script to land.
runtime.installDecisionKeepReviewingCopy: ScriptVault has enough detail to proceed, but this install still deserves a quick manual review.
runtime.installIncognitoBlockedTitle: ScriptVault is not allowed in private windows
runtime.installIncognitoBlockedMessage: This script cannot be installed from an incognito window until ScriptVault is allowed to use extension storage there. Enable Allow in Incognito, then re-open the script URL, or install from a regular window.
runtime.installErrorNoUserscriptFoundMessage: ScriptVault could not find a pending install request. Download the userscript again from its source page.
runtime.installErrorExpiredMessage: This install request is too old. Please try downloading the script again.
runtime.installErrorInvalidUserscriptMessage: No valid userscript metadata block found.
runtime.installProvenanceReviewSourceDetail: Review where this script came from. Check the update channel before you trust future updates.
runtime.installProvenanceLocalFileDetail: This review started from a local file rather than a remote install page.
runtime.installProvenanceGreasyForkDetail: Install and update provenance points at a Greasy Fork listing or payload.
runtime.installProvenanceOpenUserJsDetail: Install and update provenance points at OpenUserJS.
runtime.installProvenanceGitHubDetail: Install or update metadata points at GitHub-hosted source.
runtime.installProvenanceGitLabDetail: Install or update metadata points at GitLab-hosted source.
runtime.installProvenanceHostMismatchDetail: Installed from {installHost}, but future updates come from {updateHost}.
runtime.installProvenanceLocalRemoteUpdateDetail: Local install with a remote update channel declared in metadata.
runtime.installSignatureTrustedDetail: Signature is valid and the signing key is trusted.
runtime.installSignatureUntrustedDetail: This script is signed, but the signing key is not yet trusted in ScriptVault.
runtime.installSignatureIncompleteDetail: Signature verification did not complete cleanly.
runtime.installSignatureCheckingTrustDetail: ScriptVault is checking the embedded signature and signer trust.
runtime.installSourceTrustSubtitle: Review where this script came from and whether you trust its signer.
runtime.installTrustSourceRegistryChangedBody: Previous install came from {previousName} ({previousHost}). This update is from {nextName} ({nextHost}). Confirm you trust the new origin before installing.
runtime.installProvenanceVerifyingDeclared: Verifying declared Sigstore provenance for @require dependencies.
runtime.installNoRequireProvenance: No @require-provenance metadata was declared for these dependencies.
runtime.installMetadataLowRiskApis: Metadata only asks for low-risk userscript APIs
runtime.installAlertVersionDowngradeBody: This replaces your current version with an older build ({versionChange}).
runtime.installAlertAllSitesAccessBody: This script declares a universal run or connect rule. ScriptVault will not grant all-site browser access unless you explicitly approve broad access in the install options.
runtime.installAlertCryptoKeywords: Crypto / Wallet Keywords from Untrusted Source
runtime.installAlertCryptoKeywordsBody: This script mentions wallet, seed phrase, or other crypto-related terms and was loaded from a source that is not a known userscript repository. Active scam campaigns distribute wallet-draining scripts this way — verify the author before installing.
runtime.installAlertLargePayloadBody: This script is {size} across {lines} lines, so first-run parsing may take longer than usual.
runtime.installCopyUpdate: ScriptVault will replace your current copy with {summary} and preserve its script ID.
runtime.installCopyDowngrade: This will intentionally roll the script back to an older version from {host}.
runtime.installCopyReinstall: This installs the same version again, which is useful when you want a clean replacement from the original source.
runtime.installCopyInstall: ScriptVault will add this as a new userscript from {host}.
runtime.installDependencyCardSubtitle: Check whether each @require URL is reachable and whether declared Sigstore provenance verifies.
runtime.installUnverifiedRemoteCodeTitle: This @require has no SRI hash. It loads whatever the CDN serves. Pin it with #sha256=... to verify, or set Security > Subresource Integrity to Require to block un-pinned dependencies.
runtime.installReviewNavStatus: Reviewing {section}. Use Left and Right arrow keys to move between sections.
runtime.installGrantWillPromptPermission: Will prompt for the Chrome '{permission}' permission at install.
runtime.installOptionalPermissionNote: * Chrome will ask you for the matching browser permission after you click install. Decline to keep the script working without that capability.
runtime.installPrivilegedHostScopeNote: GM_xmlhttpRequest, GM_webSocket, GM_download, GM_cookie, and GM_webRequest are limited to the declared run hosts. @connect entries explicitly widen network, download, WebSocket, and DNR targets; cookie access stays run-host scoped unless the advanced cross-scope override is enabled.
runtime.installBrowserHostGrantsNote: ScriptVault asks the browser only for hosts this script declares in run rules, update URLs, dependencies, or @connect. Universal rules stay blocked until you approve broad access.
runtime.installSecurityAnalysisSubtitleScanning: Scanning the script metadata and source for risky patterns.
runtime.installSecurityAnalysisCheckingBackgroun: ScriptVault checks the script in the background while you review it.
runtime.installLocalAiReviewSubtitleOptIn: Optional Chrome Prompt API summary generated on this device.
runtime.installLocalAiEnableInSettings: Enable on-device AI in Settings to summarize this install review locally.
runtime.installNoEmbeddedSignaturePlain: This script does not declare an embedded signature.
runtime.installEnableOnInstallDescription: Start running the script immediately after installation.
runtime.installAutoUpdateDescription: Keep checking the published source for newer versions.
runtime.installAllowAllSiteBrowserAccessDescript: Required only because this script declares <all_urls>, *://*/*, or another universal host rule.
runtime.installErrorBroadHostAccessRequired: This script asks for all-site browser access. Approve broad access or narrow its @match/@connect rules before installing.
runtime.installErrorHostAccessDenied: Browser host access was not granted for {hosts}.
runtime.installErrorNoBackgroundResponse: No response from background (service worker may have stopped)
runtime.installErrorHelperNoScriptSaved: No script was saved. Review the install details, then try again.
runtime.installSuccessActiveCopy: {name} is active now. You can inspect settings, storage, and update history from the dashboard.
runtime.installSuccessDisabledCopy: {name} was saved disabled. Enable it from the dashboard when you are ready to let it run.
runtime.installSuccessDowngradedNextStep: Version changes are applied immediately, but the script keeps your existing per-script settings.
runtime.installSuccessUpdatedNextStep: Existing script settings and stored values were preserved during the update.
runtime.installSuccessSavedNextStep: ScriptVault saved the script locally before leaving the install review.
runtime.installSignatureValidUntrusted: Signature is valid, but this signer is not trusted yet.
runtime.installReachableUnverifiedDetail: {ok} reachable, {unverified} reachable but status could not be verified.
runtime.installDependencyNotProbedDetail: {url} - not probed (only external http(s) URLs are checked)
runtime.installVerifyingSigstoreBundles: Verifying Sigstore bundle signatures and Fulcio identities.
runtime.installVerifiedAuthorDetail: {count} @require dependencies were signed by the declared Fulcio identities.
runtime.installAllProvenanceVerified: All declared @require-provenance bundles verified against the dependency bytes and expected author identities.
runtime.installPartialProvenanceDetail: Declared provenance verified for some dependencies; other dependencies do not declare provenance.
runtime.installPartialProvenanceSummary: Declared provenance verified, but not every @require dependency has provenance metadata.
runtime.installProvenanceFailedOrIncomplete: One or more @require provenance checks failed or are incomplete.
runtime.installProvenanceReviewBeforeInstalling: One or more declared provenance checks failed or are missing required metadata. Review before installing.
runtime.installLocalAiReadySummary: Generate a short local summary from ScriptVault static analysis and this script source. This may download the Chrome on-device model if it is not ready yet.
runtime.installLocalAiUnavailableSummary: Chrome Prompt API is not available in this browser context.
runtime.installLocalAiReviewSubtitleDevice: Chrome Prompt API summary. Script text stays on this device.
runtime.installLocalAiReviewingOutput: The local model is reviewing the analyzer output.
runtime.installLocalAiNoSummary: The local model did not return a summary.
runtime.installLocalAiGeneratedSubtitle: Generated locally with Chrome Prompt API.
runtime.installLocalAiCouldNotRunSubtitle: Chrome Prompt API summary could not run.
runtime.installAnalysisCouldNotFinish: ScriptVault could not finish this scan.
runtime.installAnalysisManualReviewCopy: You can still review permissions, scope, and source details before deciding.
runtime.installSecurityAnalysisSubtitleResults: Static scan results for this specific install payload.
runtime.installNoNotableFindingsReturned: No notable findings returned from static analysis.
runtime.installAnalysisScannerError: The scanner hit an error while it checked this script.
runtime.installAnalysisOpenCodePreview: Review the install details manually and open the code preview if the source is unfamiliar.
runtime.installErrorInitializeMessage: The install page could not initialize. Try re-opening the userscript URL.
runtime.devtoolsConsoleEmptyTitle: Console messages from user scripts will appear here when capture is available
runtime.devtoolsConsoleEmptyDetail: This panel currently focuses on network and execution insight first.
runtime.devtoolsConsoleSearchUnavailable: Console search is unavailable in this panel
runtime.devtoolsConsoleCaptureUnavailable: Console capture isn’t available here yet. Use Network or Execution for current insight.
runtime.devtoolsCouldNotRefresh: Could not refresh {failures}. Showing the last available data.
runtime.devtoolsDiagnosticsRefreshFailed: Diagnostics refresh failed. Showing the last available data.
runtime.devtoolsNoNetworkRequestsYet: No network requests yet. Open a page that runs userscripts to capture activity.
runtime.devtoolsNoRequestsMatchDetail: No requests match "{query}". Clear the filter or try a script, host, or method name.
runtime.devtoolsNoNetworkRequestsDetail: Open a page that runs userscripts to capture activity.
runtime.devtoolsNoExecutionDataYet: No execution data yet. Scripts will appear here after they run.
runtime.devtoolsNoScriptsMatchExecutionDetail: No scripts match "{query}". Reset the filter to return to execution stats.
runtime.devtoolsNoExecutionDataDetail: Scripts will appear here after they run.
runtime.devtoolsNoNetworkExport: No network requests to export yet.
runtime.devtoolsNoTraceExport: No network or execution data to export yet.
runtime.emptyVaultDescription: Create a script or import an existing userscript. ScriptVault keeps scripts local unless you enable sync or backups.
runtime.emptyNoMatchesDescription: No scripts matched{details}. Adjust the search or filters to return to the full workspace.
runtime.emptyViewDescription: Try another filter, refresh the workspace, or show all scripts.
runtime.noScriptsDesc: Create a new script or import one to get started.
runtime.settingsHeroDescription: Autosaved controls for ScriptVault itself. Filter the workspace to focus on interface, automation, security, or recovery without losing the advanced depth underneath.
runtime.settingsAutoReloadHelp: Automatically reload the active page when a script changes
runtime.settingsTrashModeHelp: Keep deleted scripts in trash for recovery
runtime.settingsCustomCssHelp: Add custom CSS to the dashboard
runtime.settingsSearchIntegrationHelp: Search for scripts when visiting new sites
runtime.settingsFirefoxSyncWebdavOnly: Firefox build currently supports WebDAV sync only.
runtime.settingsAllowInternalSyncEndpointsHelp: Advanced: permits WebDAV/S3 sync to localhost, LAN, link-local, or private IPv6 endpoints. Leave off unless you operate the server.
runtime.settingsSyncCredentialsSessionOnly: Keep sync credentials for this browser session only
runtime.settingsSyncCredentialsSessionOnlyHelp: Stores provider tokens, passwords, endpoint metadata, and the sync passphrase in session storage instead of persistent settings. Reconnect after browser restart.
runtime.settingsSyncEncryptionHelp: Encrypts uploaded sync JSON with AES-256-GCM before it leaves this device. Existing plaintext sync files remain readable.
runtime.settingsS3CredentialNote: Credentials are AWS SigV4-signed and sent only to the configured endpoint. Cloudflare R2 uses region auto; MinIO and Backblaze B2 use path-style addressing by default for non-AWS endpoints.
runtime.settingsSyncTokenStorageDisclosure: Choose a provider to inspect stored sync credentials.
runtime.settingsAutosaveOnBlur: Save content when editor loses focus
runtime.settingsNoSaveConfirm: Do not show confirmation dialog on save
runtime.settingsTrimTrailingWhitespaceModifiedLi: Trim trailing whitespace from modified lines
runtime.settingsModifyCspLabel: Modify existing content security policy (CSP) headers:
runtime.settingsModifyCspHelp: Allow scripts to bypass CSP restrictions
runtime.settingsStatsUrlRetentionHelp: Origin only is the default. Choosing Origin only or Do not store irreversibly scrubs previously stored URL detail.
runtime.settingsAllowHttpHeadersLabel: Allow HTTP headers to be modified by scripts:
runtime.settingsDefaultTabTypesLabel: Default tab types to run scripts in:
runtime.settingsAllowLocalFilesLabel: Allow scripts to access local files:
runtime.settingsDeniedHostsPlaceholder: <No previously denied runtime host permissions found>
runtime.downloadsPermissionHelp: GM_download requires the optional downloads permission. Grant it here if it was not requested at script install time.
runtime.downloadWhitelistHelp: Regex patterns for allowed file extensions
runtime.settingsNoMatchesDescription: Adjust the category filter or clear the search input to bring sections back into view.
runtime.utilitiesHeroDescription: Export scripts, restore archives, connect cloud backups, and inspect runtime behavior. Restores can overwrite matching scripts, and app settings only come back when the source contains them and you opt in below.
runtime.utilitiesSearchPlaceholder: Search zip, cloud, import, network log...
runtime.exportIncludeStorageLabel: Include stored values in JSON, ZIP, and cloud backups, then restore them when present
runtime.exportIncludeSettingsLabel: Include ScriptVault settings in JSON and cloud backups, then restore them when present
runtime.exportIncludeSettingsCredentialsLabel: Include sync credentials when settings are exported or restored
runtime.exportCredentialsRisk: Risk: this can write WebDAV credentials, OAuth tokens, and S3 keys into portable archives or replace the live credentials during restore.
runtime.zipPreserveMetadata: ZIP archives preserve declared @require and @resource metadata for each script.
runtime.utilityCloudNote: Firefox build hides OAuth cloud providers until a dedicated identity flow ships.
runtime.cloudBackupRestoreNote: Cloud backups can restore scripts and stored values. App settings only come back when enabled above.
runtime.zipArchiveDescription: Portable script archive. App-wide settings are not included.
runtime.vaultJsonDescription: Exports scripts plus the options enabled above.
runtime.backupScheduleNote: Control automatic backup cadence and retention for the managed backup vault.
runtime.backupNotifySuccess: Notify when a scheduled backup succeeds
runtime.backupNotifyFailure: Notify if a scheduled backup fails
runtime.backupWarnStorageFull: Warn when backup storage gets too large
runtime.backupIncludeCredentials: Include sync credentials in scheduled backup archives
runtime.backupIncludeCredentialsHelp: Off by default. Enables WebDAV credentials, OAuth tokens, and S3 keys inside managed backup ZIPs.
runtime.backupBrowserNote: Review stored backups, export them, or restore the full vault or selected scripts with a preview first.
runtime.scriptStatsDescription: Export execution stats for all scripts
runtime.tampermonkeyImportDescription: Import from Tampermonkey's text backup format
runtime.installLocalFileNote: Pick a .user.js file or drag and drop one anywhere on this page.
runtime.workspacesNote: Save and switch between different sets of enabled and disabled scripts.
runtime.standaloneDefaultStatus: Select a script or use the current selection.
runtime.noNetworkRequestsDetail: GM_xmlhttpRequest calls will appear here with status, size, and timing once scripts make requests.
runtime.performanceBudgetsNote: Set execution time limits per script. Scripts exceeding budget are highlighted.
runtime.runtimeRepairNote: Inspect setup state and repair userScripts registrations, alarms, and menus without restarting the whole extension.
runtime.supportSnapshotNote: Pick which data categories to include in the support bundle. Sensitive categories - script names, URLs, error log, network log, denied hosts - default to OFF so personal data stays on your device unless you opt in.
runtime.supportSnapshotSummaryDefault: Bundle includes runtime status, backup inventory, and counts by default. Sensitive categories are off until you explicitly tick them.
runtime.publicApiTrustNote: Review which web origins and extensions are trusted to call the public API. Unknown extensions are denied by default. Inspect the recent external audit trail below.
runtime.signingTrustNote: Manage the trusted signing keys used during install and verification flows.
runtime.noActivityDetail: Recent installs, updates, repairs, and errors will appear here.
runtime.utilitiesNoMatchesDescription: Adjust the category filter or clear the search input to bring the tools back into view.
runtime.trashHeroDescription: Everything removed from the vault lands here first, with clear retention policy, quick search, and permanent-delete actions that stay explicit.
runtime.trashRetentionBannerDefault: Deleted scripts stay here for the configured retention window before permanent cleanup.
runtime.trashSearchPlaceholder: Filter deleted scripts by name, author, or version
runtime.trashEmptyDescription: Deleted scripts will appear here when recovery is available.
runtime.trashDisabledBanner: Trash is disabled. New deletes bypass recovery and are removed immediately.
runtime.trashRetentionNextPurge: Deleted scripts stay here for {retention}; next automatic purge is {date}.
runtime.trashRetentionCleanup: Deleted scripts stay here for {retention} before permanent cleanup.
runtime.trashFilterStatusDisabled: Trash is disabled. Deleted scripts are removed immediately.
runtime.trashFilterStatusCleanup: Deleted scripts stay here for {retention} before final cleanup.
runtime.trashEmptyDisabledDescription: Deleted scripts bypass recovery while this policy is off.
runtime.trashEmptyDescriptionWithRetention: Deleted scripts will stay here for {retention} before permanent cleanup.
runtime.trashNoMatchSearchDescription: Try a different name, author, or version search.
runtime.trashNoMatchFilterDescription: Switch the time filter to inspect a different recovery window.
runtime.trashCouldNotLoad: Trash could not be loaded right now.
runtime.trashUnavailableDescription: ScriptVault could not load deleted scripts right now.
runtime.helpHeroDescription: Search the control surface, launch common flows, and keep API or shortcut details one step away while you work.
runtime.helpSearchPlaceholder: Search commands, shortcuts, APIs, and matching tools
runtime.helpActionNewScriptDescription: Create a fresh userscript from the dashboard.
runtime.helpActionImportScriptDescription: Pull in a local .user.js or archive file.
runtime.helpActionFindScriptsDescription: Search GreasyFork and OpenUserJS without leaving the app.
runtime.helpActionCommandPaletteDescription: Jump to commands, scripts, and tools from one keyboard surface.
runtime.helpActionOpenSettingsDescription: Adjust runtime, editor, and sync preferences.
runtime.helpActionOpenUtilitiesDescription: Go straight to backup, import, cloud, and diagnostics.
runtime.helpActionOpenTrashDescription: Review deleted scripts and restore them if needed.
runtime.helpActionCheckUpdatesDescription: Run an immediate update sweep across installed scripts.
runtime.helpInstallScriptsDescription: Navigate to any .user.js URL, use Find Scripts, or drag files onto this dashboard.
runtime.helpManageScriptsDescription: Toggle on/off, click name to edit, right-click update icon to force-update.
runtime.helpTemplatesDescription: Click + New to pick from 6 starter templates.
runtime.helpCloudSyncDescription: Settings tab, Sync section. Supports WebDAV, Google Drive, Dropbox, and OneDrive.
runtime.helpBulkActionsDescription: Select scripts with checkboxes, Shift+click for range, then use the action dropdown.
runtime.helpGmApiNote: All functions are also available as promise-based GM.* variants, such as await GM.getValue().
runtime.helpTrustedTypesDefaultDescription: ScriptVault runs scripts in USER_SCRIPT world, which is separate from page Trusted Types policy.
runtime.helpTrustedTypesMainDescription: Scripts that use page context or unsafeWindow must obey the page policy for raw innerHTML, script URLs, and inline handlers.
runtime.helpTrustedTypesDomDescription: Prefer textContent, append, createElement, and GM_addElement with attributes.
runtime.helpTrustedTypesHtmlDescription: Use a target-site approved policy when the page requires it; do not create broad passthrough policies to bypass CSP.
runtime.helpPatternTesterPlaceholder: Enter a URL to test (e.g., https://example.com/page)
runtime.helpPatternResultsPrompt: Enter a URL to see which scripts would run on it.
runtime.helpAboutDescription: A lightweight userscript manager with a fast local control surface and a deliberate editing workspace.
runtime.helpNoMatchesDescription: Clear the search or switch categories to bring the reference surface back into view.
runtime.editorPreviewingUnsavedCss: Previewing unsaved CSS in active tab
runtime.runOnTabTitle: Run this script once on the active tab
runtime.runOnTabRequiresChrome: Run on Tab requires Chrome 135 or newer
runtime.runOnTabOpenScript: Open a script before running it on a tab
runtime.runOnTabOpenWebPage: Open a web page tab in this window, then run again
runtime.previewCssTitle: Preview UserCSS on the active tab
runtime.previewCssDraftTitle: Preview this UserCSS draft on the active tab
runtime.userCssPreviewOpenDraft: Open a UserCSS draft before previewing
runtime.userCssPreviewOpenWebPage: Open a web page tab in this window, then preview again
runtime.userCssPreviewActiveToast: Previewing unsaved UserCSS on this tab
runtime.userCssNoVariables: This UserCSS draft has no configurable variables
runtime.userCssDefaultsApplied: UserCSS defaults applied to the draft
runtime.scriptInfoDescription: Metadata, runtime health, and update history for the current script.
runtime.scriptNoPublishReceipt: No publish handoff receipt recorded yet
runtime.scriptStorageDescription: Inspect and edit the values this script persists through the GM storage APIs.
runtime.perScriptSettingsDescription: Override updates, execution behavior, sync protection, and URL matching without touching the source code.
runtime.scriptSyncLockLabel: Lock from cloud sync (protect local edits)
runtime.scriptSyncLockTitle: When enabled, cloud sync will not overwrite this script's local changes
runtime.scriptSyncLockStatus: Script was manually edited — sync will not overwrite. Uncheck to allow sync.
runtime.urlOverridesDescription: Override where this script runs without editing its code. Uncheck Original sections to disable them entirely.
runtime.metadataGlobPatternsHelp: Glob patterns from the script's metadata
runtime.metadataMatchPatternsHelp: Match patterns from the script's metadata
runtime.metadataExcludePatternsHelp: Exclude patterns from the script's metadata
runtime.externalResourcesDescription: Review @require and @resource dependencies, then pull in library URLs without leaving the editor.
runtime.searchCdnLibrariesPlaceholder: Search CDN libraries (e.g. jquery, lodash, react)...
runtime.searchCdnjsPrompt: Search cdnjs for popular libraries to add as @require
runtime.findUserscriptsIntro: Search trusted script directories, preview source, and install without leaving the dashboard.
runtime.findScriptsPlaceholder: Search by domain or keyword (e.g. youtube.com, dark mode)...
runtime.findScriptsAria: Search userscripts by domain or keyword
runtime.findScriptsCustomCatalogHint: HTTPS only · reviewed origin stays fixed
runtime.findScriptsTemplateHelp: Use {query} for the encoded search term and optional {page}. Local addresses, credentials, HTTP, and unknown placeholders are rejected.
runtime.searchScriptDirectoriesDescription: Enter a site domain or workflow keyword. Results show install status, source metadata, and a source preview before you install.
runtime.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this script?
runtime.noUpdates: All scripts are up to date

extDescription.message: A powerful userscript manager with GM API support, cloud sync, and auto-updates
